## Meeting purpose

[Discuss the process for onboarding new clients and generating content using AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Developed a templated process for client onboarding, research, and content generation using AI tools like ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Can automate many steps like persona/audience research, keyword research, topic clustering, and article outlining/writing](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Aim to fully document the 6-week onboarding process to streamline and scale efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

## Topics

### Client Onboarding Process

  - [Gather basic info on client's products, services, target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Conduct keyword research for relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Organize keywords into topic clusters for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Use ChatGPT to generate summaries, descriptions, persona insights](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [Import keywords and seed info into AirOps/AirTable](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Run automated workflows for:](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Audience/persona research](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [In-depth topic research (Perplexity, Anthropic)](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Article outline generation](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Review and refine outlines, identify new article opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Generate draft article content](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

### Scaling and Efficiency

  - [Fully document the 6-week onboarding process as a template](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Streamline deliverables using automation](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Easily handle more clients while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/n-oy4E-P-sB-jUB4tvNbNvkszKqL3VCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
